zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Scrope於大約1375年出生在英國越可爾馬斯哈姆時，她的父親Sir Stephen Scrope25歲，母親Margery Welles26歲。她於大約1396年與Sir Baldwin Freville III結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1418年8月之後在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Scrope于大约1375年出生在英国越可爾馬斯哈姆时，她的父亲Sir Stephen Scrope25岁，母亲Margery Welles26岁。她于大约1396年与Sir Baldwin Freville III结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1418年8月之后在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Scrope was born about 1375, in Masham, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Stephen Scrope, was 25 and her mother, Margery Welles, was 26. She married Sir Baldwin Freville III about 1396. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died after August 1418, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Scrope est née environ 1375, à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Stephen Scrope, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margery Welles, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Baldwin Freville III environ 1396. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après août 1418, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Scrope um 1375 in Masham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Stephen Scrope 25 und ihre Mutter Margery Welles 26. Sie hat um 1396 Sir Baldwin Freville III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach August 1418 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Scrope è nata il circa 1375 nel Masham, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Stephen Scrope, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margery Welles, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Baldwin Freville III circa 1396. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il agosto 1418, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Scropeが約1375年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムで生まれた時，父Sir Stephen Scropeは25歳，母Margery Wellesは26歳であった。約1396年にSir Baldwin Freville IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1418年8月以後にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Scrope(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 요르크실르 마샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Stephen Scrope(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Welles(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1396년 Sir Baldwin Freville III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1418년 8월 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Scrope nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Stephen Scrope, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margery Welles, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Baldwin Freville III aproximadamente 1396. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após agosto de 1418, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Scrope родилась около 1375 г. в местности машам, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Stephen Scrope было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Welles, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Baldwin Freville III около 1396 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла после августа 1418 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Baldwin Freville III aproximadamente 1396. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió después de agosto de 1418, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
